documentation.description:
---------------------------------------------------------------
 The abstract Excel output stream root type.                 --
 From this package, you can use the following derived types: --
    * Excel_Out_File    : output in a file                   --
    * Excel_Out_String  : output in a string                 --
 Of course you can define your own derived types.            --
---------------------------------------------------------------

simple_types.name: Color_Type
Encoding_Type
simple_types.code:
type Encoding_Type is
  (Windows_CP_874,
   Windows_CP_932,
   Windows_CP_936,
   Windows_CP_949,
   Windows_CP_950,
   Windows_CP_1250,
   Windows_CP_1251,
   Windows_CP_1252,
   …,
   Apple_Roman);

enumeration_literals.name: BIFF4
enumeration_literals.description:
Excel 4.0
BIFF5,    --  Excel 5.0 to 7.0
BIFF8);   --  Excel 8.0 (97) to 11.0 (2003) - UTF-16 support

simple_types.name: Horizontal_Alignment
simple_types.code:
type Horizontal_Alignment is
  (general_alignment, to_left, centred, to_right, filled,
   justified, centred_across_selection,
   distributed);

simple_types.name: Text_Orientation
simple_types.code:
type Text_Orientation is
  (normal,
   stacked,
   rotated_90,
   rotated_270);

simple_types.name: Vertical_Alignment
simple_types.code:
type Vertical_Alignment is
  (top_alignment, centred, bottom_alignment,
   justified,
   distributed);

tagged_types.name: Excel_Out_File
tagged_types.code: type Excel_Out_File is new Excel_Out_Stream with private;

tagged_types.code: type Excel_Out_Stream is abstract tagged private;

tagged_types.name: Excel_Out_String
tagged_types.code: type Excel_Out_String is new Excel_Out_Stream with private;

documentation.description:
Merge a certain amount of cells with the last one,
  right to that cell, on the same row.

parameters.description:

Jump 0 or more cells down
